Claim 50% Off Now

Los Angeles Rodent Specialists

Rodent Control

Mice and rats are more than a nuisance — they carry disease, chew wiring, and contaminate food. Our targeted rodent control program eliminates the problem at its source and keeps them from coming back.

Get a Free Rodent Inspection
🦠

Health Risk

Rodents carry hantavirus, salmonella, and other pathogens that contaminate surfaces and food.

⚡

Fire Hazard

Rodents gnaw on electrical wiring — a leading cause of house fires in the United States.

🏠

Property Damage

They chew through insulation, pipes, and structural materials causing costly damage over time.

What's Included

✓ We Cover

  • ✓ Mice (all species)
  • ✓ Rats (Norway & Roof Rats)
  • ✓ Full home inspection
  • ✓ Bait station placement
  • ✓ Snap trap installation
  • ✓ Entry point identification
  • ✓ Exclusion recommendations
  • ✓ Attic & crawl space inspection
  • ✓ Garage & outbuilding assessment
  • ✓ Follow-up monitoring visits

✗ Not Included

  • ✗ Structural sealing / repair work
  • ✗ Dead rodent removal (available as add-on)
  • ✗ Squirrels & wildlife
  • ✗ Insulation replacement

Combo Plans Available

Combine Rodent Control with our Pest Control plan for complete home protection at the best value. Includes all 40+ pest treatments plus full rodent management.

Ask About Combo Plans →

Rodent Treatment Schedule

A multi-step approach for complete elimination and prevention

1

Initial Visit

Full inspection, trapping setup, bait station placement, entry point mapping

2

2-Week Check

Monitor bait stations, reset traps, assess activity levels

3

1-Month Follow-Up

Confirm elimination, adjust strategy if needed, exclusion guidance

4

Quarterly Maintenance

Ongoing monitoring to prevent re-infestation, seasonal proofing tips

Get a Quote — 50% Off First Treatment

Family Owned · Licensed & Insured in California

Signs You Have Rodents

Don't wait — early action prevents bigger problems

💩

Droppings near food, in cabinets, or along walls

🔊

Scratching or scurrying sounds in walls or attic

🕳️

Gnaw marks on food packaging, wires, or wood

👃

Musty or ammonia-like odor from hidden areas

🪺

Nesting material like shredded paper or insulation

🐾

Tracks or grease marks along baseboards

Seeing any of these? Don't wait.
